allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports:', list\(d.get\('exports', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\); print\('main:', d.get\('main','n/a'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package-lock.json'\); console.log\('lockfile v:', pkg.lockfileVersion\); console.log\('packages uuid:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.packages?.['node_modules/uuid'], null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { v4 } = require\('uuid'\); console.log\('uuid v4 OK:', v4\(\)\); const ExcelJS = require\('exceljs'\); const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook\(\); console.log\('exceljs OK:', !!wb\);")
